---
title: "Counterfactual evaluation of machine learning models (PyData Talk)"
date: 2015-09-25
author: Jonathan Whitmore
draft: true
categories: []
---

Here is an excellent talk by Michael Manapat at the [PyData Seattle 2015](http://seattle.pydata.org/) conference. I wish that this style of talk -- of really digging deep with specific examples -- becomes more common!

## Michael Manapat: Counterfactual evaluation of machine learning models

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/embed/QWCSxAKR-h0 >}}

The slides can be found [here](http://www.slideshare.net/MichaelManapat/counterfactual-evaluation-of-machine-learning-models), and the paper that it's partially based on is [here](http://arxiv.org/abs/1403.1891).
